body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: User-added image]"}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by FeedOps"}], "data-id": "this-add-on-was-built-by-feedops"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://www.feedops.com/", "children": [{"text": "Visit add-on website!"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For support with this add-on "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.feedops.com/", "children": [{"text": "contact FeedOps"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Overview"}], "data-id": "overview"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Include keywords in your product titles popular with shoppers searching for the products you sell. Get free clicks from the Google shopping tab and set up a traffic report. Get ongoing support for Merchant Center - including help with any errors or warnings with your feed."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Benefits and Features"}], "data-id": "benefits-and-features"}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Sell more products in Google and Facebook without the complexity."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Run your own Google Smart Shopping Campaign. Get automated budget and goal recommendations."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create and manage your own Facebook Catalog Feed. Use this for Facebook and Instagram ads and shopping channels."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create and manage your own Google Shopping Feed. Get ongoing help with Google Merchant Center"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Include keywords in your product titles popular with shoppers searching for the products you sell."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Get free clicks from the Google shopping tab and set up a traffic report."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Get support with Merchant Center errors and warnings."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Get customer success management support."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Channel specific product title optimizations. Optimize product titles using product data attributes in bulk at a website level or at a category level."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Get notifications on how the Google Smart Shopping Campaign is performing."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Add URL Tags to your Google Shopping feed to track performance of Google\u2019s Free Product Listings."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select and order which categories to advertise on. Rewrite these product categories in bulk for product title optimizations and reconfigure the Google Product Category."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Rewrite product attributes in bulk for product title optimizations."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Edit and optimize any attribute in the feed at a product level."}]}]}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up the FeedOps Add-on"}], "data-id": "set-up-the-feedops-add-on"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To set up the FeedOps add-on:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto by Maropost control panel click on the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Find the FeedOps add-on and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The FeedOps add-on will be installed in your control panel."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Follow the steps on the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.feedops.com/integrations/feedops-neto", "children": [{"text": "FeedOps help site"}]}, {"text": " to set up your FeedOps connection."}]}]}]}]
